meta.purpose: Comprehensive gap analysis, competitive benchmarking, and feature improvement roadmap for Cursor AI implementation
meta.implementationNote: This file is the canonical roadmap spec. See CHECKLIST.md section 'Product roadmap 2026' for shipped vs pending items.

currentStrengths: Trust score + Integration score dual-axis review model (unique differentiator)
Convex real-time backend with comprehensive schema coverage
SYN token reward system incentivizing quality contributions
Fellow program creating expert authority layer (synlabFellows)
criticalGaps: No real-time price tracking / price drop alerts beyond basic priceHistory
No deal aggregation or coupon discovery layer
No video review infrastructure (only videoUrl stored, not hosted)
No structured expert vs user opinion split in UI
No AI-powered natural language product finder / conversational discovery
No API public developer portal for widget embedding
No product changelog / version tracking over time
No brand/manufacturer response system on reviews
No social proof layer (import reviews from Amazon, Reddit, etc.)
No community 'setup showcase' voting beyond basic likes
No AR product visualization (arEnabled field exists but unused)
No heat map or usage analytics dashboard for users
No knowledge base / FAQ per product
Missing protocol-level compatibility checker (Matter, Zigbee, Z-Wave, Thread)

phase1: Homepage: Live score feed (homepageInsights.liveScoreFeed), ecosystem health donut-style summary, trending topics from Convex, deal pulse from affiliate price deltas
Product page: Protocol compatibility badge matrix, lab freshness badge, score history (single-version message in ScoreTrendChart)
Compare: Weighted score customizer, ecosystem overlap panel (union/intersection)
Compatibility: AI assistant (Claude optional), heuristic simulation runner (integrationSimulations.runHeuristic), apiCompatibilityMatrix sample table, links to hub builder / leaderboard / finder
Hub builder (COMPAT-001 MVP): /tools/hub-builder — canvas + save to userSmartHomeConfigs
Convex modules: homepageInsights, compatibilityLeaderboard, productFinder, apiCompatibility, hubBuilder
stillOutstanding: Full drag-drop graph canvas with pair-wise apiCompatibilityMatrix edges
Forum AI summarizer, methodology voting UI, dashboard SYN portfolio, etc.
Programmatic SEO protocol pages and pair pages
Technical debt crons from roadmap (stale scores, broken affiliate links)

items: Add Score History Timeline to product pages
Add Protocol Compatibility Badge Matrix to product pages
Weighted Score Customizer on comparison pages
NEW-006: Research Report Hub with interactive charts
Programmatic SEO: Protocol pages + compatibility pair pages

convexPatterns.realtimeSubscriptions: Use useQuery() for all live data (scores, forum, compatibility). Use useMutation() for user actions (ratings, configs, votes)
convexPatterns.indexUsage: Always use defined indexes — e.g. query novaEcosystemCompatibility with .withIndex('by_product', q => q.eq('productId', id))
convexPatterns.paginatedLists: Use .paginate() for product grids, forum threads, review lists
convexPatterns.scheduledActions: Use Convex scheduler for: price checks (nightly), stale score alerts (weekly), newsletter sends (campaign.scheduledFor)

componentLibrary.recommendation: Shadcn/ui for base components, recharts for data viz, dnd-kit for drag-drop canvas in hub builder, @google/model-viewer for AR
componentLibrary.iconSet: Use ecosystem brand icons (Alexa, HomeKit, Google Home, Matter, Zigbee, Z-Wave SVGs) from official brand kits

useCases: AI Compatibility Assistant: system prompt includes product schema + user's config
AI Product Finder: tool_use with search_products + get_scores tools
Forum Thread Summarizer: simple user message with thread content
AI Comparison Narrative: structured output with chooseAIf + chooseBIf fields
aiIntegration.caching: Cache AI responses in novaPosts or a new aiResponseCache table keyed by input hash to avoid redundant API calls

performanceTargets.CLS: < 0.1 — reserve space for dynamically loaded score widgets
performanceTargets.compatibilityToolLoad: < 1s — preload ecosystem data on route entry
